# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Simple User Auth (Hashed)
 * Description: Provides shortcode-based user registration and login with secure password hashing and verification.
 * Version: 1.0.0
 * Author: Example
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

final class SUA_Hashed_Auth_Plugin {
    const META_HASH = '_sua_password_hash';

    public static function init() {
        add_shortcode('sua_register', [__CLASS__, 'shortcode_register']);
        add_shortcode('sua_login', [__CLASS__, 'shortcode_login']);
        add_action('init', [__CLASS__, 'handle_post_requests'], 9);

        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, [__CLASS__, 'on_activate']);
    }

    public static function on_activate() {
        if (!get_option('sua_auth_salt')) {
            update_option('sua_auth_salt', wp_generate_password(64, true, true), false);
        }
    }

    private static function get_salt() {
        $salt = get_option('sua_auth_salt');
        if (!$salt) {
            $salt = wp_generate_password(64, true, true);
            update_option('sua_auth_salt', $salt, false);
        }
        return $salt;
    }

    private static function hash_password($password) {
        $salt = self::get_salt();
        return password_hash($salt . "\n" . $password, PASSWORD_DEFAULT);
    }

    private static function verify_password($password, $hash) {
        if (!$hash || !is_string($hash)) return false;
        $salt = self::get_salt();
        return password_verify($salt . "\n" . $password, $hash);
    }

    public static function handle_post_requests() {
        if (!isset($_POST['sua_action'])) return;
        if (!is_user_logged_in() && !session_id()) {
            // avoid starting sessions; rely on WP auth cookies
        }

        $action = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['sua_action']));
        if ($action === 'register') {
            self::handle_register();
        } elseif ($action === 'login') {
            self::handle_login();
        } elseif ($action === 'logout') {
            self::handle_logout();
        }
    }

    private static function set_flash($key, $value) {
        set_transient(self::flash_key($key), $value, 60);
    }

    private static function get_flash($key) {
        $v = get_transient(self::flash_key($key));
        if ($v !== false) delete_transient(self::flash_key($key));
        return $v;
    }

    private static function flash_key($key) {
        $ip = isset($_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR']) ? $_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'] : '0.0.0.0';
        $ua = isset($_SERVER['HTTP_USER_AGENT']) ? $_SERVER['HTTP_USER_AGENT'] : '';
        return 'sua_flash_' . $key . '_' . md5($ip . '|' . $ua);
    }

    private static function handle_register() {
        if (!isset($_POST['_wpnonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['_wpnonce'])), 'sua_register')) {
            self::set_flash('error', 'Invalid request.');
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }

        $username = isset($_POST['username']) ? sanitize_user(wp_unslash($_POST['username']), true) : '';
        $email    = isset($_POST['email']) ? sanitize_email(wp_unslash($_POST['email'])) : '';
        $password = isset($_POST['password']) ? (string) wp_unslash($_POST['password']) : '';
        $confirm  = isset($_POST['confirm_password']) ? (string) wp_unslash($_POST['confirm_password']) : '';

        if ($username === '' || $email === '' || $password === '') {
            self::set_flash('error', 'All fields are required.');
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }

        if (!is_email($email)) {
            self::set_flash('error', 'Invalid email address.');
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }

        if (strlen($password) < 8) {
            self::set_flash('error', 'Password must be at least 8 characters.');
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }

        if ($password !== $confirm) {
            self::set_flash('error', 'Passwords do not match.');
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }

        if (username_exists($username)) {
            self::set_flash('error', 'Username already exists.');
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }

        if (email_exists($email)) {
            self::set_flash('error', 'Email already in use.');
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }

        $user_id = wp_insert_user([
            'user_login' => $username,
            'user_email' => $email,
            'user_pass'  => wp_generate_password(64, true, true), // not used for auth; random placeholder
            'role'       => 'subscriber',
        ]);

        if (is_wp_error($user_id)) {
            self::set_flash('error', $user_id->get_error_message());
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }

        $hash = self::hash_password($password);
        update_user_meta($user_id, self::META_HASH, $hash);

        self::set_flash('success', 'Registration successful. You can now log in.');
        wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
        exit;
    }

    private static function handle_login() {
        if (!isset($_POST['_wpnonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['_wpnonce'])), 'sua_login')) {
            self::set_flash('error', 'Invalid request.');
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }

        $identifier = isset($_POST['identifier']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['identifier'])) : '';
        $password   = isset($_POST['password']) ? (string) wp_unslash($_POST['password']) : '';
        $remember   = !empty($_POST['remember']);

        if ($identifier === '' || $password === '') {
            self::set_flash('error', 'Please enter your username/email and password.');
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }

        $user = false;
        if (is_email($identifier)) {
            $user = get_user_by('email', $identifier);
        } else {
            $user = get_user_by('login', $identifier);
        }

        if (!$user || !($user instanceof WP_User)) {
            self::set_flash('error', 'Invalid credentials.');
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }

        $hash = get_user_meta($user->ID, self::META_HASH, true);

        if (!self::verify_password($password, $hash)) {
            self::set_flash('error', 'Invalid credentials.');
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }

        wp_set_current_user($user->ID);
        wp_set_auth_cookie($user->ID, $remember, is_ssl());
        do_action('wp_login', $user->user_login, $user);

        $redirect = isset($_POST['redirect_to']) ? esc_url_raw(wp_unslash($_POST['redirect_to'])) : '';
        if (!$redirect) $redirect = home_url('/');
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }

    private static function handle_logout() {
        if (!isset($_POST['_wpnonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['_wpnonce'])), 'sua_logout')) {
            self::set_flash('error', 'Invalid request.');
            wp_safe_redirect(wp_get_referer() ?: home_url('/'));
            exit;
        }
        wp_logout();
        $redirect = isset($_POST['redirect_to']) ? esc_url_raw(wp_unslash($_POST['redirect_to'])) : '';
        if (!$redirect) $redirect = home_url('/');
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }

    public static function shortcode_register($atts) {
        $atts = shortcode_atts([
            'redirect_to' => '',
        ], $atts, 'sua_register');

        if (is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="sua-message">You are already logged in.</div>';
        }

        $error = self::get_flash('error');
        $success = self::get_flash('success');

        $out = '';
        if ($error) $out .= '<div class="sua-error" style="color:#b32d2e;">' . esc_html($error) . '</div>';
        if ($success) $out .= '<div class="sua-success" style="color:#1a7f37;">' . esc_html($success) . '</div>';

        $out .= '<form method="post" class="sua-form sua-register-form">';
        $out .= wp_nonce_field('sua_register', '_wpnonce', true, false);
        $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="sua_action" value="register" />';
        if (!empty($atts['redirect_to'])) {
            $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="redirect_to" value="' . esc_attr($atts['redirect_to']) . '" />';
        }
        $out .= '<p><label>Username<br /><input type="text" name="username" autocomplete="username" required /></label></p>';
        $out .= '<p><label>Email<br /><input type="email" name="email" autocomplete="email" required /></label></p>';
        $out .= '<p><label>Password<br /><input type="password" name="password" autocomplete="new-password" required /></label></p>';
        $out .= '<p><label>Confirm Password<br /><input type="password" name="confirm_password" autocomplete="new-password" required /></label></p>';
        $out .= '<p><button type="submit">Register</button></p>';
        $out .= '</form>';

        return $out;
    }

    public static function shortcode_login($atts) {
        $atts = shortcode_atts([
            'redirect_to' => '',
        ], $atts, 'sua_login');

        $error = self::get_flash('error');
        $success = self::get_flash('success');

        $out = '';
        if ($error) $out .= '<div class="sua-error" style="color:#b32d2e;">' . esc_html($error) . '</div>';
        if ($success) $out .= '<div class="sua-success" style="color:#1a7f37;">' . esc_html($success) . '</div>';

        if (is_user_logged_in()) {
            $user = wp_get_current_user();
            $out .= '<div class="sua-message">Logged in as ' . esc_html($user->user_login) . '.</div>';
            $out .= '<form method="post" class="sua-form sua-logout-form">';
            $out .= wp_nonce_field('sua_logout', '_wpnonce', true, false);
            $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="sua_action" value="logout" />';
            $redirect = !empty($atts['redirect_to']) ? $atts['redirect_to'] : home_url('/');
            $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="redirect_to" value="' . esc_attr($redirect) . '" />';
            $out .= '<p><button type="submit">Log out</button></p>';
            $out .= '</form>';
            return $out;
        }

        $out .= '<form method="post" class="sua-form sua-login-form">';
        $out .= wp_nonce_field('sua_login', '_wpnonce', true, false);
        $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="sua_action" value="login" />';
        if (!empty($atts['redirect_to'])) {
            $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="redirect_to" value="' . esc_attr($atts['redirect_to']) . '" />';
        }
        $out .= '<p><label>Username or Email<br /><input type="text" name="identifier" autocomplete="username" required /></label></p>';
        $out .= '<p><label>Password<br /><input type="password" name="password" autocomplete="current-password" required /></label></p>';
        $out .= '<p><label><input type="checkbox" name="remember" value="1" /> Remember me</label></p>';
        $out .= '<p><button type="submit">Log in</button></p>';
        $out .= '</form>';

        return $out;
    }
}

SUA_Hashed_Auth_Plugin::init();
